schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.short: Income support of Rs. 6000/year in 3 instalments to eligible small/marginal farmer families.
schemes.eligibility: Small/marginal farmers with land records; exclusions apply for certain categories.
schemes.how: Apply through PM-KISAN portal / Common Service Centres; Aadhaar and bank account linked.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.short: Crop insurance against natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers notified crops in notified areas; premium subsidised.
schemes.how: Enroll through banks / insurance intermediaries within the window announced each season.

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.short: Soil testing and nutrient recommendations to improve soil health.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers as per state sampling schedule.
schemes.how: Contact your agriculture department / extension officer for sampling.
